trivia: The Falcon 2000 is Dassault's twin-engine take on the Falcon 900 trijet: same wide cabin, two engines, transatlantic range. Fighter DNA shows in the handling, a Dassault trademark.
The series kept growing: EX brought new engines, LX added winglets, and the line is still in production. F2TH covers the whole family, so your catch spans three decades of Falcons.
funFacts: Dassault also builds the Rafale fighter, and it shows in the wing.
